Utils¶

Aux funcs

 1function IntToSequence(i,n)
 2    return PowerSequence(GF(2))!Intseq(i,2,n);
 3end function;
 4
 5.. code-block:: text
 6:linenos:
 7
 8function IntToElt(i,n,K)
 9    return Seqelt(IntToSequence(i,n),K);
10end function;
11
12.. code-block:: text
13:linenos:
14
15function getConvertionFunction(n :vector:=false)
16    D:=AssociativeArray();
17    if vector then
18        for i:=0 to (2^n-1) do
19            D[i]:=IntToSequence(i,n);
20        end for;
21    else
22        K:=GF(2^n);
23        for i:=0 to (2^n-1) do
24            D[i]:=IntToElt(i,n,K);
25        end for;
26    end if;
27    return D;
28end function;
29
30.. code-block:: text
31:linenos:
32
33function CF(f)
34    M:=Matrix( 2*n+1, 2^n, [1: u in F] cat [Trace(a^i * u): u in F, i in [1..n]] cat [Trace(a^i * f(u)): u in F, i in [1..n]]);
35    return LinearCode( M );
36end function;
